title: Limitless SMP
description:
This is the modpack created for Limitless SMP's Season 3 including mods and datapacks like Terralith, Incendium and many others!

We are actively recruiting new members, you can apply in the discord below!
body:
This is the modpack created for and ran on the Limitless SMP servere's third season, including mods and datapacks like Terralith, Incendium, and Chipped.

Other than world generation, the modpack includes many optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and FerrititeCore, Vanilla+ content mods such as Supplimentaries, Chipped, Inmis, and Comforts, patch mods like Moss Fix, ModernFix, and Carpet, and quality of life mods including Litematica, Minihud, and IronChest.

As mentioned in the summary, we are recruiting content creators to join our server, the discord link is in the "External Resources" section. There are people available in that discord to help with modpack problems as well!

This modpack is heavily based off of Fablously Optimized, which you can find here: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and some versions contain content from Vanilla Tweaks: [https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net)
